---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Linite
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## ✨ Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise one-line description of the feature you'd like. -->

---

## 🧩 Problem / Motivation

<!-- Describe the problem this feature solves or the use case it enables.
     e.g., "I'm frustrated when I have to..." or "Currently there's no way to..." -->

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. How would it work? What would it look like? -->

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?
     Why is your proposed solution better? -->

---

## 📦 Affected Component(s)

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Software Catalog (`data/catalog/`)
- [ ] Package Manager Support (`core/package_manager.py`, `data/package_maps/`)
- [ ] Installation Engine (`core/installer.py`, `core/execution_engine.py`)
- [ ] GUI (`gui/`)
- [ ] Profiles (`data/profiles/`, `core/profile_engine.py`)
- [ ] Script Exporter (`core/script_exporter.py`)
- [ ] CLI / Entry Point (`main.py`)
- [ ] Detection / Distro Support (`core/detection.py`, `core/distro.py`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] New software entry in catalog
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

---

## 📋 Additional Context / Mockups

<!-- Add any mockups, screenshots, diagrams, or extra context here. -->

---

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions to confirm this is not a duplicate
- [ ] This feature aligns with Linite's goal of simplifying Linux software installation
- [ ] I am willing to contribute a pull request for this feature (optional)
